id: one of the advantages of ... is
intention: 表达某件事的一个优点是……
naturalChunk: one of the advantages of ... is
avoidSaying: one of the advantages of learn ... is
sentencePatterns: One of the advantages of ... is that it can ...
One of the main advantages of ... is ...
realLifeExamples: One of the advantages of learning English is that it can improve my thinking ability.
One of the main advantages of online learning is flexibility.
usageNotes: of 后面通常接名词或动名词，比如 learning, reading, working from home。
productionPrompts: 用 One of the advantages of ... is that it can ... 造一句和学习或工作有关的句子。
